headline: Charter Bets On Data And AI To Reframe Growth Story
summary: Charter Communications (NasdaqGS:CHTR) has appointed John Lee as Head of Intelligence Ventures to lead new data and AI driven product initiatives. The company is focusing on using its proprietary data and AI capabilities to develop differentiated offerings for advertisers and enterprise clients. Charter's Spectrum Reach unit became DoubleVerify's first Certified Transparent Streaming partner, targeting greater program level transparency in streaming TV advertising. For investors tracking...
